title: Apple's 2026 Product Roadmap: New iPhones, Macs, and Apple Watch Are Coming
body: The most ambitious new products on Apple's 2026 roadmap fall into the smart home category. According to multiple sources, Apple is planning to significantly expand its presence in the connected home, with several new devices expected later this year.

title: A Leaked Document Just Changed The AI Race (What's New In AI This Week)
body: Anthropic's next model leaked, both AI giants are eyeing IPOs, and 81,000 people revealed what they really want from AI. This week's digest.

title: WWDC 2026 preview: iOS 27, AI Siri, Gemini partnership and other expected Apple announcements
body: Apple is set to host WWDC 2026 on June 8. Alongside a range of software updates, the company may introduce an AI-powered Siri chatbot at the event. Here's what we know so far.

title: Fox News Digital's News Quiz: April 3, 2026
body: Tiger Woods seeks treatment following his arrest on suspicion of driving under the influence, and a singer cheers a controversial Apache flyover in this week's News Quiz.

title: Mac Studio 2026: Apple's Biggest Desktop Leap Yet Is Coming
body: New leaks reveal Apple's M5 Mac Studio with major performance upgrades, a shifting release timeline, and rising prices. Here's what we know so far.
